title: Started in Cybersecurity
description: Began working in security, building the foundation in incident response, malware analysis, and defensive tooling that later shaped a focus on threat hunting.

title: Community Workshops & Guest Sessions
description: Delivered cyber security workshops and guest sessions at engineering colleges and universities — including KBC North Maharashtra University (Jalgaon) and Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women (Pune).

title: Joined Microsoft
description: Joined Microsoft, working with Microsoft Defender XDR and Microsoft Sentinel on detection engineering and threat hunting at scale.

title: First Microsoft Publication
description: Began publishing security research through official Microsoft channels, including the Microsoft Security Blog and Microsoft Tech Community.

title: Conference Speaker
description: Took the stage as a conference speaker, starting with CyberLab Con 2026, sharing threat hunting and detection engineering research with the community.

title: Open Source Contributions
description: Started contributing to community open-source security projects, including LOLBAS and the LOLAI project, alongside maintaining a personal detection rules repository.

title: Certified Red Team Analyst (CRTA)
description: Earned the Certified Red Team Analyst (CRTA) credential from Cyberwarfare Labs, deepening offensive tradecraft to sharpen detection engineering and threat hunting.

title: AI Security Research
description: Expanded research into AI security — mapping how living-off-the-land and adversarial techniques apply to AI systems and tooling.
